nasb.text: When Hushai had come to Absalom, Absalom said to him, “Ahithophel has spoken thus. Shall we carry out his plan? If not, you speak.”

esv.text: And when Hushai came to Absalom, Absalom said to him, “Thus has Ahithophel spoken; shall we do as he says? If not, you speak.”

cnv.text: 於是戶篩來見押沙龍，押沙龍問他說：“亞希多弗說了這樣的話，我們可以照著他的話去行嗎？如果不可以，請你提議吧！”

ccb.text: 户筛来了，押沙龙就把亚希多弗的建议告诉他，问他：“我们应该照亚希多弗的提议去做吗？如果不可行，说说你的看法吧。”
